templates.name: Newsletter Welcome Email
templates.subject: Thanks for joining SetVenue
templates.previewText: Here's what to expect from your newsletter subscription.

body.headline: Thanks for joining — here's what to expect
body.intro: You're on the list for new locations, exclusive deals, and occasional production tips from SetVenue.

sections.title: How to browse
sections.content: Use the marketplace to compare locations, crew stays, and event venues. Filter by city, type, price, or production need. Start with featured listings for standout options.

sections.title: How to list
sections.content: If you have a property to offer, use the List Your Property page to submit the basics. SetVenue is built for hosts who want clear expectations and quality bookings — with 0% host fees.

sections.title: FAQ
sections.content: Need more detail first? Visit the FAQ for booking flow, privacy tiers, and host requirements.

body.footer: We do not sell your email. You can update preferences or unsubscribe in one click at any time.

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Property Owner
templates.subject: Free listing for {{property_address}} — film & photo shoots
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I found your property at {{property_address}} and thought it could be a great fit for film productions, photo shoots, and events in {{city}}.

I'm the founder of SetVenue — a marketplace connecting property owners with production companies, photographers, and event organizers looking for unique spaces.

Here's how it works for owners:

- You set your own rental price
- We charge renters a 10% booking fee — you keep 100% of what you quote
- No listing fee, no commission taken from you

For context: Giggster, the biggest competitor, takes 15–25% from owners. We take 0%.

We're giving free listings to our first 500 property owners — 6 months at no cost, no strings attached.

Would you be open to a quick call this week? Or you can list directly at setvenue.com/free-listing.

Either way, happy to answer any questions.

Best,
Josh
SetVenue

templates.name: Cold Outreach — Real Estate Agent
templates.subject: Referral opportunity for your property owner clients
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I'm reaching out because you work with property owners in {{city}} and I think some of them might be interested in earning extra income from their spaces.

I'm the founder of SetVenue — a marketplace where film productions, photographers, and event organizers book unique properties for shoots and events.

For owners, it's a no-brainer:

- They set their own price and keep 100% of it
- We charge renters a booking fee, not owners
- Listings are free for the first 500 owners (6 months)

If any of your clients have interesting properties — homes, warehouses, lofts, commercial spaces — they could be a great fit.

Would you be open to a quick conversation? I'd love to explain how referrals work and see if this makes sense for your clients.

Best,
Josh
SetVenue
setvenue.com/free-listing

templates.name: Social Media DM
templates.body:
Hey {{name}} — I came across your property at {{property_address}} and think it'd be perfect for film shoots and events.

I run SetVenue, a marketplace for production companies booking unique spaces. We charge renters a fee, not owners — so you keep 100% of your rental price.

We're offering free listings to our first 500 owners. Takes 10 minutes to set up: setvenue.com/free-listing

Worth a look?

templates.name: Follow-Up #1 (3 days)
templates.subject: Re: Free listing for {{property_address}}
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Just circling back on my note from a few days ago about listing {{property_address}} on SetVenue.

I know inboxes get busy — wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

Quick recap: we're a marketplace for film productions, photo shoots, and events looking for spaces in {{city}}. You set your price, keep all of it, and listing is free for our first 500 owners.

If you're curious but not ready to list, happy to answer questions first. Just reply here.

setvenue.com/free-listing

Best,
Josh

templates.name: Follow-Up #2 (7 days, last chance)
templates.subject: Last note — free listing closing soon
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

This is my last note — I don't want to clutter your inbox.

We're close to filling our first 500 free listings on SetVenue, and I wanted to give you one more shot at a free 6-month listing for {{property_address}} before we close it out.

After the first 500, listings will move to our standard plan. Right now it's genuinely free — no credit card, no commitment.

If {{city}} productions are booking in your area, your property could be earning from shoots and events you'd otherwise never know about.

If now isn't the right time, no worries at all. But if you want in: setvenue.com/free-listing

Either way, thanks for your time.

Josh
SetVenue
